title: Documentation
description: Access our technical blueprint, architectural guidelines, and integration manuals.
adminDescription: Manage, organize, and curate technical resources for the engineering organization. {count} total documents.
searchPlaceholder: Search resources by title, content or keywords...
noDocuments: No documents found matching your filters.
emptyDataDescription: Published engineering resources will appear here once they are available.
emptySearchDescription: Try a different search term, change the type or tag, or clear all filters.
deleteConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to delete this document? This action cannot be undone.
tagsDirectoryDesc: Organize and structure learning materials by maintaining a clean taxonomy. Created tags are instantly available across document creation and filtering.
searchTagsPlaceholder: Search tags by name or ID...
createTagDialogDesc: Enter a unique name for the tag. It will be immediately available across all guides, runbooks, and references.
confirmDeleteTagDesc: Are you sure you want to delete the tag
confirmDeleteTagWarning: This action will permanently remove the tag from all associated documents and cannot be undone.
tagAlreadyExists: A tag with this name already exists.
tagDeleteError: Failed to delete tag. It may be currently associated with documents.
noMatchingTagsDesc: We couldn't find any tags matching "{query}". Try adjusting your search query.
noTagsYetDesc: Create your first tag to start classifying guides, runbooks, and tutorials across the platform.
